title: salix caprea var. tenuifolia
intro: Salix caprea var. tenuifolia, also known as Goat Willow or Tenuifolia Goat Willow, is a plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae) and is a variant of the Goat Willow (Salix caprea). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Salix caprea var. tenuifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Salix caprea var. tenuifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and topical creams for external use.
